item.title: Just had a motorcycle accident on the German autobahn with 100kph+. Car overtook me and just moved in front of me without giving me any room to brake. Now I have a broken collarbone which needs to be operated soon \u2026 keep save and always wear full protective gear! saved my life !
item.description: Just had a motorcycle accident on the German autobahn with 100kph+. Car overtook me and just moved in front of me without giving me any room to brake. Now I have a broken collarbone which needs to be operated soon \u2026 keep save and always wear full protective gear! saved my life !

item.title: In the 80s patient \u201cGeorge\u201d with severe OCD shot himself in the head attempting suicide. Rather than killing him, the bullet destroyed the part of his brain responsible for OCD.

item.title: Just had a motorcycle accident on the German autobahn with 100kph+. Car overtook me and just moved in front of me without giving me any room to brake. Now I have a broken collarbone which needs to be operated soon \u2026 keep save and always wear full protective gear! saved my life !
item.description: Just had a motorcycle accident on the German autobahn with 100kph+. Car overtook me and just moved in front of me without giving me any room to brake. Now I have a broken collarbone which needs to be operated soon \u2026 keep save and always wear full protective gear! saved my life !

item.title: Just had a motorcycle accident on the German autobahn with 100kph+. Car overtook me and just moved in front of me without giving me any room to brake. Now I have a broken collarbone which needs to be operated soon \u2026 keep save and always wear full protective gear! saved my life !
item.description: Just had a motorcycle accident on the German autobahn with 100kph+. Car overtook me and just moved in front of me without giving me any room to brake. Now I have a broken collarbone which needs to be operated soon \u2026 keep save and always wear full protective gear! saved my life !
